world_name: World of Darkness - Vampire: The Masquerade
prompt: Vertical portrait 9:16 high-resolution atlas world map for a World of Darkness: Vampire the Masquerade inspired gothic-punk modern horror RPG setting. Terrain type: single_continent. Draw one immense fictional continent as a nocturnal gothic vampire domain atlas, noir atmosphere, domain territories marked visually without readable labels. Include gothic city districts, opulent Elysium masquerade locations, haunted cemeteries, sewer warrens, cathedral spires, fog-filled parks at midnight, ruined havens, Camarilla court cities, Anarch free zones, Sabbat-infested ruins, werewolf wilderness preserves, mage cabal observatories, blood-moon coastlines, old rail corridors, shadowy suburbs, and secret supernatural routes. The continent must span many climates and biomes: rain-slick gothic megacities, temperate forests, cold northern mountains, misty moors, haunted wetlands, arid badlands, volcanic blacklands, coastal fog belts, river valleys, and stormy harbors. Coastline must be realistic and complex with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, river deltas, fjords, barrier islands, sea caves, and varied landforms. Include irregular offshore islands in uneven clusters, all different sizes and shapes, some as abandoned resort Elysiums, occult islands, lighthouse cemeteries, and hidden vampire havens. Large detailed atlas composition, dark parchment and moonlit crimson accents, no readable labels, no legible text, no logos, no modern satellite style.
